detail.name: Humanity
detail.public_notice:
Humanity has suffered an attack and users are advised to avoid the project's bridge and liquidity pools until the issue is resolved. For more info, please refer to this post

As part of its recovery plan, Humanity Protocol (H) has migrated from its previous token contract to a new token contract. For additional details regarding the migration, please refer to this announcement.

According to GoPlus, this is a proxy contract. The contract owner can make code changes to the token contract including but not limited to disabling sells, changing fees, minting, transferring tokens etc. Exercise caution.

description.en: Humanity Protocol is a blockchain featuring a native Proof of Humanity (PoH) consensus mechanism that verifies users' uniqueness as humans through decentralized identifiers (DID) and verifiable credentials (VC), combining privacy-preserving human recognition, decentralized storage, and zero-knowledge proofs to enable sybil resistance, self-sovereign identity, and user-owned data for innovative and inclusive applications.
